---
title: "Site Map"
author: "CLB"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(data.table)
library(tidyverse, warn.conflicts = F)
library(dataRetrieval)
library(styler)
library(scales)
library(here)
library(knitr)
library(lubridate)
library(dygraphs)
library(cowplot)
library(zoo)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggforce)
library(ggrepel)
library(Gmisc)
#library(patchwork)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(sf)
library(sfheaders)
library(terra)
library(FedData)
library(tidyterra)
library(whitebox)
library(stars)
library(mapview) # needs to be dev version:    remotes::install_github("r-spatial/mapview")
library(ggspatial)
library(gt)
distColors <- c('#e6194B', '#3cb44b', '#ffe119', '#4363d8', '#f58231', '#911eb4', '#42d4f4', '#f032e6', '#bfef45', '#fabed4', '#469990', '#dcbeff', '#9A6324', '#fffac8', '#800000', '#aaffc3', '#808000', '#ffd8b1', '#000075', '#a9a9a9', '#ffffff', '#000000')

okabeIto <- c("#0072B2", "#E69F00", "#CC79A7", "#009E73", "#56B4E9", "#D55E00", "#F0E442", "#999999", "#000000")
```

# Sites, Streams, and Sheds

```{r}
gp_streams <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_GreatPlains.gpkg", layer = "Streams", quiet = T) |> 
  filter(watershed %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |> 
  st_transform(crs = 4326)
gp_sheds <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_GreatPlains.gpkg", layer = "Watersheds", quiet = T) |> 
  filter(watershed %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |> 
  st_transform(crs = 4326)
# Load sites
gp_sites <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_GreatPlains.gpkg", layer = "Sites") |> 
  filter(watershed %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |> 
  st_transform(crs = 4326) |> 
  mutate(
    lon = st_coordinates(geom)[, "X"],
    lat  = st_coordinates(geom)[, "Y"]
  ) 

se_sites <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_SouthEast.gpkg", layer = "Sites") |> 
  filter(!sublocation == "HW") |> 
  st_transform(4326) |>
  mutate(
    lon = st_coordinates(geom)[, 1],
    lat = st_coordinates(geom)[, 2]
  ) 

se_streams <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_SouthEast.gpkg", layer = "Streams") |> 
  st_transform(4326)
se_sheds <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_SouthEast.gpkg", layer = "Watersheds") |> 
  st_transform(4326)

mw_sites <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_MountainWest.gpkg", layer = "Sites") |> 
  st_transform(4326) |> 
  mutate(
    lon = st_coordinates(geom)[, 1],
    lat = st_coordinates(geom)[, 2]
  ) |> 
  filter(watershed %in% c("GBJ", "JDR"))

mw_streams <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_MountainWest.gpkg", layer = "Streams") |> 
  st_transform(4326) |> 
  filter(watershed %in% c("GBJ", "JDR"))
mw_sheds <- st_read("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results/AIMS_MountainWest.gpkg", layer = "Watersheds") |> 
  st_transform(4326) |> 
  filter(watershed %in% c("GBJ", "JDR"))

all_sheds <- bind_rows(gp_sheds, mw_sheds, se_sheds) |> 
  st_transform("EPSG:5070")

# Read and transform USA shapefile
us_shp <- st_read(here("Data/USA_Shp/cb_2018_us_state_500k.shp")) |>
  filter(!STUSPS %in% c("AK", "AS", "VI", "HI", "GU", "MP", "PR")) |>
  #st_transform(4326)
  st_transform("EPSG:5070")

us_poly <- us_shp |>
  vect() |>
  aggregate() |>
  #buffer(width = 1000) |>
  project("EPSG:4326")


arid_index <- terra::rast("~/Dropbox/GIS/rasters/Global-AI_ET0__annual_v3_1/ai_v31_yr.tif")
# Scale back to real AI (values were *10,000 in the file)
arid_index <- arid_index |> 
  (\(r) r / 10000)()

# Crop to WGS84 CONUS 
arid_crop <- arid_index |> 
  crop(us_poly) |> 
  mask(us_poly)
# Reproject to EPSG:5070 (meters)
arid_crop <- arid_crop |>
  project("EPSG:5070", method = "bilinear", res = 1000)

shed_points <- all_sheds |>
  st_transform(st_crs(us_shp)) |>
  st_point_on_surface() |>
  mutate(lon = st_coordinates(geom)[, 1],
         lat = st_coordinates(geom)[, 2]) |>
  arrange(lon) |>
  mutate(watershed = factor(watershed, levels = unique(watershed))) |>
  st_drop_geometry()

#site_colors <- c("JDR" = "#0072B2", "GBJ" = "#E69F00", "KNZ" = "#CC79A7", "SHN" = "#009E73", "YMR" = "#56B4E9", "WHR" = "#D55E00", "PRF" = "#F0E442", "TAL" = "#999999")
site_colors <- c("JDR" = "#006475", "GBJ" = "#56CFD8", "KNZ" = "#613921", "SHN" = "#F2C27B", "YMR" = "#A77652", "WHR" = "#345022", "PRF" = "#5A6C0A", "TAL" = "#83A102")
all_outlets <- tibble(siteId = c("GSS01", "JSS01", "SFM01", "SHM01", "ENM01", "WHM01", "TLM01", "PRM01"))

do_stics <- read_csv(here("Data/STICs/stics_for_doRegimes.csv")) |> 
  full_join(all_outlets) |> 
  pull(siteId)
```

# Connectivity Paper

```{r}
site_colors_connectivity <- c("KNZ" = "#C5692D", "YMR" = "#FEB359", "TAL" = "#132F5B", "PRF" = "#435F90", "GBJ" = "#68434E", "JDR" = "#B47E83")

connectivity_stics <- read_csv(here("Data/STICs/stics_for_connectivity.csv")) |> 
  full_join(all_outlets) |> 
  pull(siteId)

# Define the date ranges for each watershed
connectivity_meta <- data.frame(
  watershed = c("KNZ", "TAL", "GBJ", "PRF", "YMR", "JDR"),
  start_date = as.Date(c("2022-06-22", "2023-02-01", "2022-04-22", "2023-03-09", "2022-03-25", "2023-03-22")),
  end_date = as.Date(c("2022-09-01", "2023-12-31", "2022-09-07", "2023-06-12", "2022-08-04", "2023-07-17"))
) |> 
  mutate(start_wy = calcWaterYear(start_date),
         end_wy = calcWaterYear(end_date),
         Year = year(start_date))
```

## Aridity

```{r}
# Display range (cap extremes for readability)
ai_limits <- c(0, 2)   
state_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_spatraster(data = arid_crop) +
  scico::scale_fill_scico(
    name   = str_wrap("Aridity Index (P/ET0)", width = 15),
    palette = "roma",
    direction = 1,
    limits = ai_limits,
    oob = squish,
    na.value = "#00000000",
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      title.position = "top",
      title.hjust = 0.5,
      barheight = unit(1.5, "cm"),  # bar thickness
      barwidth  = unit(10, "cm")        # center the title
      )
  ) +
  geom_sf(data = us_shp, fill = "#00000000", color = "#000000") +
  ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
  geom_point(
    data = shed_points |> filter(watershed %in% connectivity_meta$watershed),
    aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = watershed), 
    color = "#000000", size = 4, stroke = 1, shape = 21, show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = site_colors_connectivity, name = "Watershed") +
  coord_sf() +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
arid_legend <- state_map + 
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 35, hjust = 0.5),  # bigger title text
    legend.text = element_text(size = 25),                # bigger label text
    legend.key.height = unit(1.5, "cm"),                  # taller color bar
    legend.key.width  = unit(6, "cm"),                    # longer color bar
  ) 
aridity_legend <- plot_grid(get_legend(arid_legend))
state_map
ggsave(state_map, filename = here("Figs/Maps_Connectivity/Aridity_StateMap.png"), width = 40, height = 20, units = "cm")
ggsave(aridity_legend, filename = here("Figs/Maps_Connectivity/Aridity_Legend.png"), width = 20,
  height = 10,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 600)




# Display range (cap extremes for readability)
ai_limits <- c(0, 2)   
state_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_spatraster(data = arid_crop) +
  scico::scale_fill_scico(
    name   = str_wrap("Aridity Index (P/ET0)", width = 15),
    palette = "roma",
    direction = 1,
    limits = ai_limits,
    oob = squish,
    na.value = "#00000000",
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      title.position = "top",
      title.hjust = 0.5,
      barheight = unit(1.5, "cm"),  # bar thickness
      barwidth  = unit(10, "cm")        # center the title
      )
  ) +
  geom_sf(data = us_shp, fill = "#00000000", color = "#000000") +
  ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
  geom_point(
    data = shed_points,
    aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = watershed), 
    color = "#000000", size = 8, stroke = 1, shape = 21, show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = site_colors, name = "Watershed") +
  coord_sf() +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
arid_legend <- state_map + 
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 35, hjust = 0.5),  # bigger title text
    legend.text = element_text(size = 25),                # bigger label text
    legend.key.height = unit(1.5, "cm"),                  # taller color bar
    legend.key.width  = unit(6, "cm"),                    # longer color bar
  ) 
aridity_legend <- plot_grid(get_legend(arid_legend))
state_map
ggsave(state_map, filename = here("Figs/Maps/Aridity_StateMap.png"), width = 40, height = 20, units = "cm")
ggsave(aridity_legend, filename = here("Figs/Maps/Aridity_Legend.png"), width = 20,
  height = 10,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 600)
```

```{r}
# Cut into UNEP classes
arid_class <- arid_crop |>
  classify(rbind(
    c(-Inf, 0.05, 1),
    c(0.05, 0.20, 2),
    c(0.20, 0.50, 3),
    c(0.50, 0.65, 4),
    c(0.65,  Inf, 5)
  )) |> 
  as.factor()

class_labs <- c("Hyper-arid (<0.05)", "Arid (0.05–0.20)", "Semi-arid (0.20–0.50)",
                "Dry sub-humid (0.50–0.65)", "Humid (≥0.65)")
levels(arid_class) <- data.frame(ID = 1:5, Class = class_labs)

# 3) Plot with a discrete raster scale
class_cols <- c("#8c510a", "#d8b365", "#f6e8c3", "#92c5de", "#2166ac")

# Map colors to the LABELS (not the numeric IDs)
pal_named <- stats::setNames(class_cols, class_labs)

state_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_spatraster(data = arid_class) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name   = "",
    values = pal_named,
    # breaks are the label strings shown in the legend
    breaks = class_labs,
    labels = class_labs,
    drop   = FALSE,
    na.value = "#00000000"
  ) +
  geom_sf(data = us_shp, fill = NA, color = "black") +
  #guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow=2,byrow=TRUE)) +
  ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
  geom_point(
    data = shed_points |> filter(watershed %in% connectivity_meta$watershed),
    aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = watershed), 
    color = "#000000", size = 4, stroke = 1, shape = 21, show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = site_colors_connectivity, name = "Watershed") +
  coord_sf() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
aridity_cat_legend <- state_map +
  theme(legend.position = "left")
aridity_cat_legend <- plot_grid(get_legend(aridity_cat_legend))
state_map
ggsave(state_map, filename = here("Figs/Maps_Connectivity/Aridity_Categorical_StateMap.png"), width = 40, height = 20, units = "cm")
```

## Level 1 Ecoregions

```{r}
eco_regions <- st_read("~/Dropbox/GIS/shpFiles/EPA_Ecoregions/na_cec_eco_l1/NA_CEC_Eco_Level1.shp") |> 
  st_transform("EPSG:5070")
eco_colors <- read_csv("~/Dropbox/GIS/shpFiles/EPA_Ecoregions/level_1_ecoregion_palette.csv") |> 
  mutate(Ecoregion = trimws(Ecoregion)) |>
  {\(df) stats::setNames(df$HexColor, df$Ecoregion)}()

eco_colors <- c(
  "ARCTIC CORDILLERA" = "#6788B9",
  "TUNDRA" = "#99A4C7",
  "TAIGA" = "#90BEDB",
  "HUDSON PLAIN" = "#48A9B1",
  "NORTHERN FORESTS" = "#AFDAD9",
  "NORTHWESTERN FORESTED MOUNTAINS" = "#5BB254",
  "MARINE WEST COAST FOREST" = "#4CB9AF",
  "EASTERN TEMPERATE FORESTS" = "#B9D586",
  "GREAT PLAINS" = "#F2CA98",
  "NORTH AMERICAN DESERTS" = "#F8D96C",
  "MEDITERRANEAN CALIFORNIA" = "#D1E3AF",
  "SOUTHERN SEMIARID HIGHLANDS" = "#D7CF8D",
  "TEMPERATE SIERRAS" = "#B9D586",
  "TROPICAL DRY FORESTS" = "#E17B62",
  "TROPICAL WET FORESTS" = "#B96D9E",
  "WATER" = NULL
)
eco_regions_us <- st_intersection(eco_regions, us_shp |> st_union())
state_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = eco_regions_us, aes(fill = NA_L1NAME), color = "#00000000", size = 0.2) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = eco_colors, 
    name = "",
    labels = function(x) str_wrap(str_to_title(x), width = 10)
  ) +
  ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
  geom_sf(data = us_shp, fill = "#00000000", color = "grey50") +
  geom_point(
    data = shed_points |> filter(watershed %in% connectivity_meta$watershed),
    aes(x = lon, y = lat, fill = watershed), 
    color = "#000000", size = 4, stroke = 1, shape = 21, show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = site_colors_connectivity, name = "Watershed") +
  coord_sf() +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ecoregions_legend <- state_map +
  theme(legend.position = "left")
ecoregions_legend <- plot_grid(get_legend(ecoregions_legend))
state_map
ggsave(state_map, filename = here("Figs/Maps_Connectivity/Ecoregions_StateMap.png"), width = 40, height = 20, units = "cm")
ggsave(ecoregions_legend, filename = here("Figs/Maps/Ecoregions_Legend.png"), width = 20, height = 10, units = "cm", dpi = 600)
```

```{r}
state_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = us_shp, fill = "#ffffff", color = "#000000") +
  geom_point(
    data = shed_points,
    aes(x = lon, y = lat, color = watershed), size = 6, stroke = 1
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = site_colors) +
  coord_sf() +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  #   geom_text_repel(
  #     data = shed_points,
  #     aes(x = lon, y = lat, label = watershed),
  #     size = 4
  # ) +
  # ggspatial::annotation_scale(
  #   location = "bl", width_hint = 0.3, # bottom left, 30% of plot width
  #   line_width = 0.7, text_cex = 1
  #   ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "white")
  )
state_map
ggsave(state_map, filename = here("Figs/Maps/StateMap.png"), width = 40, height = 20, units = "cm")
```

## Merge Sites

```{r}
#### Get common cols ####
common_cols <- c("siteId", "slope", "twi", "drainage_area_sqkm", "outlet_dist_m", "elev_m", "watershed", "lon", "lat")

# SE
se_sites <- se_sites |>
  # Select only the columns we want to keep
  mutate(outlet_dist_m = distance_from_outlet,
         slope = slope_point,
         elev_m = elevation,
         drainage_area_sqkm = drainage_area_m / 1000000  # Convert m² to km²
         ) |> 
  select(all_of(common_cols))
  

# Merge GP and MW, all have same cols, then drop and merge with SE
all_sites <- gp_sites |>
  st_drop_geometry() |> 
  full_join(mw_sites |> st_drop_geometry()) |> 
  select(all_of(common_cols)) |> 
  full_join(se_sites |> st_drop_geometry()) |> 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326)


# Combine streams
all_streams <- list(
  se_streams |> select(watershed),
  gp_streams |> select(watershed),
  mw_streams |> select(watershed)) |> 
  bind_rows()
```

### HydroShare Extent

```{r}
bb_expanded <- all_sheds |>
  # buffer by 10 meters
  #st_buffer(5) |>
  # transform bbox back to WGS84
  st_transform(4326) |>
  # get expanded bbox
  st_bbox()

# convert bbox to an sf polygon
bb_poly <- st_as_sfc(bb_expanded)

# plot with mapview
mapview(all_sheds) + mapview(bb_poly, col.regions = "red", alpha = 0.1)
```

## Get DEMs

```{r}
# TAL

tal_dem <- list.files("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Data/1mDEM/TAL", pattern = ".tif$", full.names = TRUE) |> 
  lapply(rast)
tal_dem <- do.call(merge, tal_dem)

whr_dem <- list.files("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Data/1mDEM/WHR", pattern = ".tif$", full.names = TRUE) |> 
  lapply(rast)
whr_dem <- do.call(merge, whr_dem)

prf_dem <- list.files("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Data/1mDEM/PRF", pattern = ".tif$", full.names = TRUE) |> 
  lapply(rast)
prf_dem <- do.call(merge, prf_dem)

# List only files that match *_DEM.tif
dem_paths <- list.files("~/Dropbox/AIMS/GIS/Results", pattern = "_DEM\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE) |> 
  (\(x) x[basename(x) != "KNG_DEM.tif"])()

# Create a named list of SpatRasters using watershed prefix (e.g., "DRC", "GBJ")
all_dems <- setNames(
  lapply(dem_paths, rast, lyrs = "original_dem"),
  str_remove(basename(dem_paths), "_DEM\\.tif$")
)

all_dems[["TAL"]] <- tal_dem
all_dems[["WHR"]] <- whr_dem
all_dems[["PRF"]] <- prf_dem
```

# STICs

```{r}
gpPresAbs <- read_csv(here("Data/STICs/GP_DailyPresAbs.csv"))
sePresAbs <- read_csv(here("Data/STICs/SE_DailyPresAbs.csv"))

presAbs <- bind_rows(
  gpPresAbs,
  sePresAbs)  |> 
  arrange(watershed, date)


mwStics <- list.files(here("Data/MW/STICs"), full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE) |>
  # Only keep files in folders that end with _combined
  lapply(\(file) {
    read_csv(file, col_types = cols(.default = col_character()))
  }) |> 
  bind_rows() |>
  rename(dateTime = datetime) |>
  filter(qual_rating != "poor") |>
  select(dateTime, siteId = SiteID, wetdry) |>
  mutate(
    wetdry = case_when(
    wetdry %in% c("dry", "0") ~ 0,
    wetdry %in% c("wet", "1") ~ 1,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_),
    watershed = case_when(
    startsWith(siteId, "D") ~ "DRC",
    startsWith(siteId, "G") ~ "GBJ",
    startsWith(siteId, "J") ~ "JDR",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_  
  )) |> 
  mutate(dateTime = parse_date_time(dateTime, orders = c("ymd HM", "ymd HMS"), tz = "UTC")) |> 
  drop_na(dateTime)

daily_presAbsMW <- mwStics |>
  mutate(
    date = as_date(dateTime)
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(watershed)) |>
  group_by(watershed, siteId, date) |>
  summarise(wetdry = preMetabolizer::calc_mode(wetdry), .groups = "drop") |>
  split(~watershed, drop = T) |> 
  lapply(\(df) {
    df |>
      select(date, siteId, wetdry) |>
      pivot_wider(
        names_from = siteId,
        values_from = wetdry
      )
  }) 
daily_presAbsMW <- bind_rows(daily_presAbsMW, .id = "watershed") |> 
  drop_na(date) |> 
  mutate(GJ8 = coalesce(GJ8, GJ8b)) |> 
  select(-GJ8b)


presAbs <- presAbs |> 
  bind_rows(daily_presAbsMW) |> 
  arrange(watershed, date)

avgPercWet <- presAbs |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(watershed, date),
    names_to = "siteId",
    values_to = "wet"
  ) |>
  group_by(watershed, siteId) |>
  summarise(
    avg_pct_wet = mean(wet == 1, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    avg_pct_dry = mean(wet == 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    total = avg_pct_wet + avg_pct_dry,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  drop_na(total) 

avgPercWet_connectivity <- presAbs |>
  left_join(connectivity_meta |> select(watershed, Year), by = "watershed") |>
  filter(year(date) == Year) |> 
  select(-Year) |> 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(watershed, date),
    names_to = "siteId",
    values_to = "wet"
  ) |>
  group_by(watershed, siteId) |>
  summarise(
    avg_pct_wet_connectivity = mean(wet == 1, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    avg_pct_dry_connectivity = mean(wet == 0, na.rm = TRUE) * 100,
    total_connectivity = avg_pct_wet_connectivity + avg_pct_dry_connectivity,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  drop_na(total_connectivity) 

all_sites <- all_sites |>
  filter(siteId %in% unique(c(do_stics, connectivity_stics))) |> 
  full_join(avgPercWet |> select(watershed, siteId, avg_pct_wet), by = c("watershed", "siteId")) |> 
  full_join(avgPercWet_connectivity |> select(watershed, siteId, avg_pct_wet_connectivity), by = c("watershed", "siteId")) |> 
  filter(watershed != "DRC")

nDays_watershed <- presAbs |>
  group_by(watershed) |>
  summarise(
    n_days = n_distinct(date),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
nDays_watershed |> filter(watershed != "DRC") |> 
  mutate(n_days = round(n_days/365.25, 2)) |> 
  rename(Site = watershed, "Years of STIC Data" = n_days) |> 
  gt::gt() |> 
  gtsave(here("Figs/stic_days.png"), zoom = 6, vwidth = 2000, vheight = 1200)
```

# Watershed Maps

## Try contour lines instead of DEM

```{r}
# Define a name map
name_map <- c(
  "KNZ" = "GP-1", "SHN" = "GP-2", "YMR" = "GP-3",
  "TAL" = "EF-1", "PRF" = "EF-2", "WHR" = "EF-3",
  "GBJ" = "ND-1", "JDR" = "ND-2"
)

shed_maps <- list()
for (shed in names(all_dems)) {
  shed_poly <- all_sheds |> filter(watershed == shed)
  site_streams <- all_streams |> filter(watershed == shed)
  site_stics <- all_sites |> filter(watershed == shed)

  if (nrow(shed_poly) == 0) {
    warning("No polygon for ", shed, ", skipping...")
    next
  }

  crs_target <- "EPSG:5070"
  shed_poly <- shed_poly |> st_transform(crs_target)
  site_streams <- site_streams |> st_transform(crs_target)

  super_sens <- site_stics |>
    st_transform(crs_target) |>
    filter(siteId %in% c("GSS01", "JSS01", "SFM01", "SHM01", "ENM01", "WHM01", "TLM01", "PRM01"))

  site_stics <- site_stics |>
    st_transform(crs_target) |>
    filter(!siteId %in% c("GSS01", "JSS01", "SFM01", "SHM01", "ENM01", "WHM01", "TLM01", "PRM01")) |>
    drop_na(avg_pct_wet) |>
    mutate(avg_pct_wet = as.numeric(avg_pct_wet))

  iso_dem <- all_dems[[shed]] |>
    as.contour() |>
    st_as_sf() |>
    st_transform(crs_target) |>
    st_intersection(shed_poly)

  # Look up the new title (fallback to original if missing)
  shed_title <- ifelse(shed %in% names(name_map), name_map[[shed]], shed)

  # Create plot
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = shed_poly, fill = NA, color = site_colors[[shed]], linewidth = 1.5) +
    geom_sf(data = iso_dem, color = "#000000", alpha = 0.5, lwd = 0.5) +
    geom_sf(data = site_streams, color = "#1F305E", linewidth = 1) +
    geom_sf(data = site_stics, aes(fill = avg_pct_wet), shape = 21, color = "black", size = 6, show.legend = FALSE, alpha = 1) +
    geom_sf(data = super_sens, shape = 22, fill = "red", color = "red", size = 6, alpha = 1) +
    viridis::scale_fill_viridis(name = "Avg. % Wet", option = "viridis", limits = c(0, 100), na.value = "grey80", direction = -1) +
    annotation_scale(height = unit(0.35, "cm"), width_hint = 0.5, text_cex = 2) +
    labs(title = shed_title) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(
        color = site_colors[[shed]], face = "bold", size = 40, hjust = 0.5
      )
    )

  shed_maps[[shed]] <- p
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(here("Figs/Maps/map_"), shed, ".png"),
    plot = p,
    width = 20,
    height = 20,
    units = "cm",
    dpi = 600
  )
}


p

```

## Legend

```{r}
shed <- "KNZ"
shed_poly <- all_sheds |> filter(watershed == shed)
site_streams <- all_streams |> filter(watershed == shed)
site_stics <- all_sites |> filter(watershed == shed)


crs_target <- "EPSG:5070"
shed_poly <- shed_poly |> st_transform(crs_target)
site_streams <- site_streams |> st_transform(crs_target)

super_sens <- site_stics |>
  st_transform(crs_target) |>
  filter(siteId %in% c("GSS01", "JSS01", "SFM01", "SHM01", "ENM01", "WHM01", "TLM01", "PRM01"))

site_stics <- site_stics |>
  st_transform(crs_target) |>
  filter(!siteId %in% c("GSS01", "JSS01", "SFM01", "SHM01", "ENM01", "WHM01", "TLM01", "PRM01")) |>
  drop_na(avg_pct_wet) |>
  mutate(avg_pct_wet = as.numeric(avg_pct_wet))

# Contour lines instead of DEM, transform, and crop to watershed
iso_dem <- all_dems[[shed]] |>
  as.contour() |> 
  st_as_sf() |> 
  st_transform(crs_target) |> 
  st_intersection(shed_poly)

super_sens <- super_sens |> mutate(sensor_type = "Outlet")
site_stics <- site_stics |> mutate(sensor_type = "STIC")

p <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = shed_poly, fill = NA, color = site_colors[[shed]], linewidth = 1) +
  geom_sf(data = site_streams, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  # STIC: circle w/ viridis fill
  geom_sf(data = site_stics, aes(fill = avg_pct_wet, shape = sensor_type), color = "black", size = 6) +
  # SuperSensor: red square
  geom_sf(data = super_sens, aes(shape = sensor_type), fill = "red", color = "red", size = 6) +
  # viridis colorbar
  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    name = "% Wet",
    option = "viridis",
    limits = c(0, 100),
    na.value = "grey80",
    direction = -1,
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      barheight = unit(1.5, "cm"),
      barwidth  = unit(10, "cm"),
      title.position = "left",
      title.vjust = 0.85
    )
  ) +
  # sensor type legend
  scale_shape_manual(
    name = "",
    values = c("STIC" = 21, "Outlet" = 22)  # circle and square
  ) +
  annotation_scale() +
  labs(title = shed) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      color = site_colors[[shed]], face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5
    ),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 35),  # bigger title text
    legend.text = element_text(size = 35),                # bigger label text
    legend.key.height = unit(1.5, "cm"),                  # taller color bar
    legend.key.width  = unit(2, "cm"), 
    legend.spacing.x = unit(2, "cm")           # gap between different legend elements
  ) +
  guides(
  shape = guide_legend(ncol = 1,
                       override.aes = list(
        size = 10,        # bigger symbols in the legend only
        stroke = 1.5     # thicker outline in the legend (optional)
      ))
  )
p
percWet <- cowplot::get_legend(p)
cowplot::ggsave2(
  filename = here("Figs/Maps/legend_avg_pct_wet.png"),
  plot = cowplot::plot_grid(percWet),
  width = 25,
  height = 10,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 600
)
```

## Connectivity Paper

## Relative Elevation

```{r}
shed_maps <- list()
all_dems_connectivity <- all_dems[names(all_dems) %in% connectivity_meta$watershed]

for (shed in names(all_dems_connectivity)) {
  shed_poly <- all_sheds |> filter(watershed == shed)
  site_streams <- all_streams |> filter(watershed == shed)
  site_stics <- all_sites |> filter(watershed == shed)
  
  if (nrow(shed_poly) == 0) {
    warning("No polygon for ", shed, ", skipping...")
    next
  }
  
  crs_target <- crs(all_dems_connectivity[[shed]])
  shed_poly <- shed_poly |> st_transform(crs_target)
  site_streams <- site_streams |> st_transform(crs_target)
  
  super_sens <- site_stics |>
    st_transform(crs_target) |>
    filter(siteId %in% c("GSS01", "JSS01", "SFM01", "SHM01", "ENM01", "WHM01", "TLM01", "PRM01"))
  
  site_stics <- site_stics |>
    st_transform(crs_target) |>
    filter(!siteId %in% c("GSS01", "JSS01", "SFM01", "SHM01", "ENM01", "WHM01", "TLM01", "PRM01")) |>
    drop_na(avg_pct_wet) |>
    mutate(avg_pct_wet = as.numeric(avg_pct_wet))# |> 
    #filter(siteId %in% connectivity_stics)
  
  # Crop and mask DEM
  cropped <- all_dems_connectivity[[shed]] |>
    crop(vect(shed_poly)) |>
    mask(vect(shed_poly))
  
  # Per-watershed normalization (0-100 scale)
  # Get min and max elevation for this watershed
  elev_min <- min(values(cropped), na.rm = TRUE)
  elev_max <- max(values(cropped), na.rm = TRUE)

  # Create relative elevation raster (0-100 scale)
  cropped_relative <- (cropped - elev_min) / (elev_max - elev_min) * 100

  # Convert raster to data frame for ggplot
  cropped_df <- as.data.frame(cropped_relative, xy = TRUE, na.rm = TRUE)
  colnames(cropped_df)[3] <- "elevation"
  
  # Create plot with relative elevation
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_spatraster(data = cropped_relative, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_gradient(
      low = "white",           # 0% elevation = white
      high = "grey20",          # 100% elevation = grey20 (dark grey)
      na.value = "#00000000",
      name = "Relative\nElevation (%)",
      limits = c(0, 100),       # Fixed limits for all maps
      breaks = c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100)  # Consistent breaks
    ) +
    geom_sf(data = shed_poly, fill = NA, color = site_colors_connectivity[[shed]], linewidth = 2) +
    geom_sf(data = site_streams, color = "#1F305E", linewidth = 1) +
    ggnewscale::new_scale_fill() +
    geom_sf(data = site_stics, aes(fill = avg_pct_wet), shape = 21, color = "#000000", size = 5, stroke = 1, show.legend = FALSE, alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_sf(data = super_sens, shape = 22, fill = "red", color = "red", size = 5, alpha = 0.8) +
    viridis::scale_fill_viridis(name = "Avg. % Wet", option = "viridis", limits = c(0, 100), na.value = "grey80", direction = -1) +
    annotation_scale(height = unit(0.35, "cm"), width_hint = 0.5, text_cex = 2) +
    labs(
      title = shed,
      subtitle = paste0("Elevation: ", round(elev_min, 1), " - ", round(elev_max, 1), " m")  # Optional: show original range
    ) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(
        color = site_colors_connectivity[[shed]], face = "bold", size = 40, hjust = 0.5
      ),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 30, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey50")  # If using subtitle
    )
  
  # Save and store
  shed_maps[[shed]] <- p
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(here("Figs/Maps_Connectivity/map_"), shed, ".png"),
    plot = p,
    width = 20,
    height = 20,
    units = "cm",
    dpi = 600
  )
}

p <- ggplot() +
  geom_spatraster(data = cropped_relative) +
  scale_fill_gradient(
    low = "white",           # 0% elevation = white
    high = "grey20",          # 100% elevation = grey20 (dark grey)
    na.value = "#00000000",
    name = str_wrap("Relative Elevation (%)", 15),
    limits = c(0, 100),       # Fixed limits for all maps
    breaks = c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100),
    guide = guide_colorbar(
      barheight = unit(1.5, "cm"),
      barwidth  = unit(10, "cm"),
      title.position = "left",
      title.vjust = 0.85,
    )# Consistent breaks
  ) +
  geom_sf(data = shed_poly, fill = NA, color = site_colors[[shed]], linewidth = 2) +
  geom_sf(data = site_streams, color = "#1F305E", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_sf(data = site_stics, aes(color = avg_pct_wet), size = 5, show.legend = FALSE, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_sf(data = super_sens, shape = 22, fill = "red", color = "red", size = 5, alpha = 0.8) +
  viridis::scale_color_viridis(name = "Avg. % Wet", option = "viridis", limits = c(0, 100), na.value = "grey80", direction = -1) +
  annotation_scale(height = unit(0.35, "cm"), width_hint = 0.5, text_cex = 2) +
  labs(
    title = shed,
    subtitle = paste0("Elevation: ", round(elev_min, 1), " - ", round(elev_max, 1), " m")  # Optional: show original range
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(
      color = site_colors[[shed]], face = "bold", size = 40, hjust = 0.5
    ),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 30, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey50"), # If using subtitle
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 35, hjust = 0.5),  # bigger title text
    legend.text = element_text(size = 35),                # bigger label text
    legend.key.height = unit(1.5, "cm"),                  # taller color bar
    legend.key.width  = unit(6, "cm"), 
  )


p  
elevLegend <- cowplot::get_legend(p)
cowplot::ggsave2(
  filename = here("Figs/Maps_Connectivity/legend_elev.png"),
  plot = cowplot::plot_grid(elevLegend),
  width = 20,
  height = 10,
  units = "cm",
  dpi = 600
)
```
